fundamental_truth.one_piece: A legendary treasure left by Joy Boy at Laugh Tale
fundamental_truth.void_century: A 100-year erased history hidden by the World Government
fundamental_truth.will_of_d: A mysterious inherited lineage tied to world-changing individuals
fundamental_truth.joy_boy: A historical figure linked to liberation and prophecy

world_structure.navigation_rule: The Grand Line is unpredictable due to magnetic and climate instability, making it impossible to navigate normally

straw_hat_pirates.goal: find One Piece and achieve personal dreams

world_government.goal: maintain global control and suppress forbidden history
world_government.secret: true rulers include the Gorosei and Imu

yonko.role: balance of power in New World

rules: Abilities manifest based on imagination or biology

power_system.combat_rule: Top-tier battles are decided by haki mastery, willpower, and adaptability more than raw devil fruit power

historical_events.void_century_war: Ancient kingdom was erased after war with allied kingdoms forming World Government
historical_events.god_valley_incident: Roger and Garp alliance defeated Rocks D. Xebec
historical_events.marineford_war: Whitebeard died attempting to save Ace; world balance shifted
historical_events.wano_war: Alliance defeated Kaido and Big Mom influence collapsed

important_artifacts.ponegliffs: Ancient stone tablets containing forbidden history

timeline_logic.rule: Small changes in early arcs exponentially change later arcs
butterfly_effect: crew composition changes affect major wars
devil fruit distribution alters global balance

arc_progression.early_game: East Blue → Alabasta (crew formation and initial world exposure)
arc_progression.mid_game: Enies Lobby → Marineford (world government conflict escalation)
arc_progression.late_game: Dressrosa → Wano (Yonko-level warfare and world destabilization)
arc_progression.endgame: Laugh Tale discovery and final war with World Government

consistency: Characters retain personality even in alternate timelines
Events must ripple across multiple factions
